dict.string: US Outdoor Navigator uses your location to find campgrounds near you, show real-time wildfire distance, and display relevant weather alerts. Your location is only used while the app is open.

Background location access enables the SOS Dead Man's Switch feature — if you miss a safety check-in while camping, the app can alert your emergency contacts with your last known GPS coordinates. This feature only activates if you enable it manually.
Background location is used exclusively for the SOS emergency check-in feature. The app tracks your location only when this safety feature is active. You can disable it at any time in Settings.
We send you critical safety alerts: active wildfires near your campsite, severe weather warnings, and SOS check-in reminders. You can customize which alerts you receive in the app's Settings.

Camera access powers the Starlink AR View feature, which uses your rear camera to overlay satellite signal strength and obstruction analysis on your real-world view. This helps you position your Starlink dish for optimal connectivity at your campsite. Camera feed is processed on-device only and never transmitted or stored.

The Digital Level feature uses your device's accelerometer and gyroscope to measure your RV's pitch and roll angle, helping you level your vehicle precisely for a comfortable stay. Sensor data is processed on-device only.
Save offline map tiles and campground photos to your photo library for use without internet connection.
